notes: When deploying this frontend to Vercel (standalone, without Replit's path proxy),
POST requests to /api/* will get 405 from this static site because the catch-all
rewrite serves index.html for every path, and Vercel's static server rejects non-GET.
Fix: set VITE_API_BASE_URL in your Vercel project environment variables to the full
origin of your deployed Guardian API server (e.g. https://guardian-api.replit.app).
The frontend fetch calls read this variable and prefix all /api/* calls with it.
On Replit's own deployment (recommended), both services deploy together and Replit's
path-based proxy routes /api/* to the API server automatically — VITE_API_BASE_URL
should be left empty or unset in that case.
